en: There was a certain man of Ramathaim-zophim of the hill country of Ephraim whose name was Elkanah the son of Jeroham, son of Elihu, son of Tohu, son of Zuph, an Ephrathite.
zh: 在以法蓮山地的拉瑪．瑣非，有一個以法蓮人名叫以利加拿，是耶羅罕的兒子、以利戶的孫子、託戶的曾孫、蘇弗的玄孫。

en: He had two wives. The name of the one was Hannah, and the name of the other, Peninnah. And Peninnah had children, but Hannah had no children.
zh: 他有兩個妻子，一個名叫哈拿，另一個名叫毘尼拿。毘尼拿有孩子，哈拿卻沒有孩子。

en: Now this man used to go up year by year from his city to worship and to sacrifice to the LORD of hosts at Shiloh, where the two sons of Eli, Hophni and Phinehas, were priests of the LORD.
zh: 這人每年都從他的本城上示羅去敬拜，獻祭給萬軍之耶和華。在示羅有以利的兩個兒子，何弗尼和非尼哈，作耶和華的祭司。

en: On the day when Elkanah sacrificed, he would give portions to Peninnah his wife and to all her sons and daughters.
zh: 以利加拿在獻祭的那天，就把祭肉分給妻子毘尼拿和她所有的兒女。

en: But to Hannah he gave a double portion, because he loved her, though the LORD had closed her womb.
zh: 但他只分給哈拿一分；他雖然愛哈拿 ，耶和華卻使哈拿不能懷孕。

en: And her rival used to provoke her grievously to irritate her, because the LORD had closed her womb.
zh: 因為耶和華使哈拿不能懷孕，她的對頭就盡力刺激她，使她苦惱。

en: So it went on year by year. As often as she went up to the house of the LORD, she used to provoke her. Therefore Hannah wept and would not eat.
zh: 年年都是這樣；每逢她上耶和華殿的時候，毘尼拿總是刺激哈拿，使她哭泣，吃不下飯。

en: And Elkanah, her husband, said to her, "Hannah, why do you weep? And why do you not eat? And why is your heart sad? Am I not more to you than ten sons?"
zh: 她的丈夫以利加拿對她說：“哈拿，你為甚麼哭泣？為甚麼不吃飯，為甚麼心裡難過呢？你有我不是比有十個兒子更好嗎？”

en: After they had eaten and drunk in Shiloh, Hannah rose. Now Eli the priest was sitting on the seat beside the doorpost of the temple of the LORD.
zh: 哈拿在示羅吃喝完了，就起來。

en: She was deeply distressed and prayed to the LORD and wept bitterly.
zh: 她心裡愁苦，就向耶和華禱告，流淚痛哭，

en: And she vowed a vow and said, "O LORD of hosts, if you will indeed look on the affliction of your servant and remember me and not forget your servant, but will give to your servant a son, then I will give him to the LORD all the days of his life, and no razor shall touch his head."
zh: 並且許願，說：“萬軍之耶和華啊，你若是看顧使女的困苦，記念我，不忘記你的使女，賜給使女一個兒子，我就必把他一生獻給耶和華，不剃他的頭。”

en: As she continued praying before the LORD, Eli observed her mouth.
zh: 哈拿向耶和華禱告了很久，以利一直在注視她的嘴。

en: Hannah was speaking in her heart; only her lips moved, and her voice was not heard. Therefore Eli took her to be a drunken woman.
zh: 原來哈拿是在心中訴說，只見她的嘴唇在動，卻聽不見她的聲音，因此以利以為她是個喝醉了的女人。

en: And Eli said to her, "How long will you go on being drunk? Put away your wine from you."
zh: 以利就對她說：“你要醉到幾時呢？快快醒過來吧！”

en: But Hannah answered, "No, my lord, I am a woman troubled in spirit. I have drunk neither wine nor strong drink, but I have been pouring out my soul before the LORD.
zh: 哈拿回答：“我主啊，不是的。我是個心靈愁苦的婦人，淡酒烈酒都沒有喝，只不過在耶和華面前傾吐我的心意。

en: Do not regard your servant as a worthless woman, for all along I have been speaking out of my great anxiety and vexation."
zh: 不要把你的使女看作不檢點的女子，我因為極度愁苦和激動，才一直傾訴到現在。”

en: Then Eli answered, "Go in peace, and the God of Israel grant your petition that you have made to him."
zh: 以利回答：“平平安安回去吧！願以色列的 神把你向他所求的賜給你。”

en: And she said, "Let your servant find favor in your eyes." Then the woman went her way and ate, and her face was no longer sad.
zh: 哈拿說：“願你的婢女在你眼前蒙恩！”於是這婦人回去，並且吃飯，臉上再沒有愁容。

en: They rose early in the morning and worshiped before the LORD; then they went back to their house at Ramah. And Elkanah knew Hannah his wife, and the LORD remembered her.
zh: 第二天，他們清早起來，在耶和華面前敬拜，然後回到他們的家鄉拉瑪，回到自己的家裡去。以利加拿和妻子哈拿同房；耶和華顧念哈拿，

en: And in due time Hannah conceived and bore a son, and she called his name Samuel, for she said, "I have asked for him from the LORD."
zh: 她就懷孕；時候到了，就生了一個兒子，哈拿給他起名叫撒母耳，因為她說：“他是我從耶和華那裡求來的。”

en: The man Elkanah and all his house went up to offer to the LORD the yearly sacrifice and to pay his vow.
zh: 以利加拿和他全家都上示羅去，向耶和華獻年祭和還所許的願；

en: But Hannah did not go up, for she said to her husband, "As soon as the child is weaned, I will bring him, so that he may appear in the presence of the LORD and dwell there forever."
zh: 哈拿卻沒有上去，因為她對丈夫說：“等孩子斷了奶，我才帶他去朝見耶和華。他要永遠住在那裡。”

en: Elkanah her husband said to her, "Do what seems best to you; wait until you have weaned him; only, may the LORD establish his word." So the woman remained and nursed her son until she weaned him.
zh: 她丈夫以利加拿對她說：“你看怎樣好，就怎樣作吧。你可以留在這裡，等到你給孩子斷了奶，但願耶和華實現他的話。”於是哈拿留在家裡乳養孩子，直到給他斷了奶。

en: And when she had weaned him, she took him up with her, along with a three-year-old bull, an ephah of flour, and a skin of wine, and she brought him to the house of the LORD at Shiloh. And the child was young.
zh: 她給孩子斷了奶之後，就帶他一同上去，又帶了一頭三歲的公牛 、十公斤麵和一皮袋酒。她把孩子帶到示羅耶和華的殿那裡；那時孩子還很小。

en: Then they slaughtered the bull, and they brought the child to Eli.
zh: 他們宰了公牛以後，就帶孩子到以利那裡，

en: And she said, "Oh, my lord! As you live, my lord, I am the woman who was standing here in your presence, praying to the LORD.
zh: 婦人說：“我主啊，我敢指著我主的性命起誓，我就是從前在這裡站在你旁邊，向耶和華禱告的那個婦人。

en: For this child I prayed, and the LORD has granted me my petition that I made to him.
zh: 那時我祈求為要得這孩子，耶和華已經把我向他所求的賜給我了，

en: Therefore I have lent him to the LORD. As long as he lives, he is lent to the LORD." And he worshiped the LORD there.
zh: 所以我現在把他獻給耶和華，他的一生是屬於耶和華的。”於是他就在那裡敬拜耶和華。
